mapper.select: SELECT u.total_user, u.NOT_APPROVED_ORGAN_USER, u.total_organ_user, o.organ_count, ap.uncomplete_volun_act, va.TOTAL_VOLUN_ACT FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_user, COUNT(CASE WHEN user_status = 2 AND user_type = 2 THEN 1 END) AS NOT_APPROVED_ORGAN_USER, COUNT(CASE WHEN user_type = 2 THEN 1 END) AS total_organ_user FROM TBL_USER) u, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS organ_count FROM tbl_organ) o, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tva.VOLUN_ACT_NO) AS uncomplete_volun_act FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY tva WHERE tva.VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE = 0) ap, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_VOLUN_ACT FROM tbl_volun_activity) va
SELECT tu.user_no, tu.ORGAN_NAME, tu.user_name, tu.USER_ID, tu.USER_EMAIL FROM tbl_user tu WHERE tu.user_type = 2 AND tu.user_status = 2

SELECT tu.user_no, tu.user_name, tu.ORGAN_NAME, tu.USER_ID, tu.USER_EMAIL, toc.ORGAN_NO FROM tbl_user tu LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN_CERT toc ON toc.USER_NO = tu.user_no WHERE tu.user_type = 2 AND tu.user_status = 2 ORDER BY tu.user_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER tu WHERE tu.user_type = 2 AND tu.user_status = 2

SELECT tu.user_no, tu.ORGAN_NAME, tu.user_name, tu.USER_ID, tu.USER_EMAIL, tu.user_birth, toc.ORGAN_NO, tbo.organ_cert_num, toc.organ_file_system_name, toc.organ_file_original_name FROM tbl_user tu LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN_CERT toc ON toc.USER_NO = tu.user_no JOIN TBL_ORGAN tbo ON toc.organ_no = tbo.organ_no WHERE tu.user_no = #{userNo}

SELECT tva.volun_act_no AS volunActNo, tbo.organ_name AS orgName, tva.volun_act_proc_end AS volunActProcEnd, tva.volun_act_organ_no AS volunActOrganNo FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN tbl_organ tbo ON tva.VOLUN_ACT_ORGAN_NO = tbo.ORGAN_NO WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY tva2 WHERE tva2.VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE = 0 ) ORDER BY tva.volun_act_proc_end LIMIT 5
SELECT tu.user_no, tu.user_email FROM tbl_user tu WHERE tu.organ_no = #{organNo} AND tu.user_status = 1 ORDER BY tu.user_last_login
